svg.title: vue-clamp package benchmark matrix
svg.desc: Full package benchmark matrix with active time by version and adjacent release deltas.
svg.text: All published versions are shown. N/A means the version or scenario has no Vue 3 public-matrix payload.
Green is lower cost, red is higher cost. The first panel shows active ms; the second shows adjacent release deltas.
Some adjacent deltas include correctness fixes that added missing reclamp work; see Markdown comparability notes.
~ and a top-right triangle mark low-confidence deltas; active-time CV above 10% is the trigger.
Cell text is median active ms; color is delta vs this scenario's first supported version.
